description.text: Staggered columns punctuate the landscape, duck and cover to the objective. One Base.

es.original: Staggered columns punctuate the landscape, duck and cover to the objective. One Base.
es.translation:
Las columnas acentúan el paisaje.
Un núcleo.

fr.original: Staggered columns punctuate the landscape, duck and cover to the objective. One Base.
fr.translation: D'immenses colonnes éparpillées recouvrent le terrain. Déplacez-vous à couvert pour atteindre l'objectif ! Une base.

de.original: Staggered columns punctuate the landscape, duck and cover to the objective. One Base.
de.translation: Diese Landschaft ist voller Säulen. Nutzt sie als Deckung und arbeitet euch zum Ziel vor. Eine Basis.

pt.original: Staggered columns punctuate the landscape, duck and cover to the objective. One Base.
pt.translation: Colunas tortas entrecortam a paisagem. Use-as como cobertura para chegar ao objetivo. Uma Base.

ru.original: Staggered columns punctuate the landscape, duck and cover to the objective. One Base.
ru.translation: Поле боя — это исписанный лист бумаги, а колонны — знаки препинания на нем. Они — вокруг цели, закрывают ее. Одна база.
